commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=40bb5c62638c395d29a900ee9c76aa1c0e2b23b0)
commands.review_summary:
Adds an `interrupt` steering mode to embedded-agent queue message options, cancels the active handle before queueing, and adds unit tests for cancel/no-cancel handles.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +43. Total +75 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the widened `steeringMode` flows into an existing `QueueMode` assignment and the cancel-before-queue path targets the run being aborted. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because this external feature PR lacks real behavior proof and needs maintainer direction on the new embedded queue API contract.

target.title: feat(embedded-agent): add 'interrupt' steeringMode to EmbeddedAgentQueueMessageOptions
target.author: nblue1-ui

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
